title: Misleading kwargs explanation for NetworksManager create function
body:
[dns_enabled (bool): When True, do not provision DNS for this network.](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/podman/domain/networks_manager.py#L42)


I have found that if I don't specify this as true, DNS for the network is disabled. So, I found this explanation confusing. I think the author meant that when true, the DNS is provisioned. English is my secondary language, but chatgpt agrees with my confusion.

comments.body: Hey, this is how [Podman API docs](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=latest#tag/networks/operation/NetworkCreateLibpod) document the option. It seems more clear (and also seems to set `dns_enabled` to true) so I believe this should be fixed. Would you like to take care of it or should I put it in the repo backlog?
I will update the comment and open PR
